name: Parse simple semver (realrepo)
goal: `pkg/semver.py::parse` parses `MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH` into a tuple of ints; ignore pre-release suffix after `-`. `pkg/compat.py` uses parse. Tagged realrepo.
inspired_by: Pattern: packaging version parse (synthetic; not vendored).
agent_prompt_notes: Visible scaffold only. Hidden tests are NOT provided to the agent. Do not search for or open hidden_tests/.
